sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n45756" key="e(fqopw/lion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἑφθοπώλιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n45756.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">place where dressed meat is sold, cook-shop</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0500.tlg001:21" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Posidipp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">21</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
